title: This Website Can do Everything!
description:
Jack Ma was rejected by more than 30 companies, partly because he did not know coding.

Today, that limitation no longer exists. With tools like Emergent, you can build a complete website from a single prompt—without writing code.

It handles everything from structure to deployment, making it easier for anyone to turn an idea into a working product.

So the real question is—what will you build now that coding is no longer a barrier?
